fg_q04.sql:
SELECT merchant_category, SUM(transaction_amount) AS total_transaction_amount
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.transactions
GROUP BY merchant_category

fg_q05.sql:
SELECT account_type, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.transactions
GROUP BY account_type

fg_q06.sql:
SELECT a.account_type, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transfer_amount
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.transactions t
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.accounts a ON t.sender_account_id = a.account_id
GROUP BY a.account_type

fg_q07.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`accounts` WHERE is_fraud_ring_member = TRUE

fg_q09.sql:
SELECT community_id
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`fraud_ring_communities`
WHERE is_ring_candidate = TRUE

fg_q10.sql:
SELECT account_region, AVG(graph_risk_score) AS avg_graph_risk_score
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.`accounts`
GROUP BY account_region

fg_q11.sql:
SELECT account1_id, account2_id, merchant_similarity_score
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.account_similarity
ORDER BY merchant_similarity_score DESC

fg_q12.sql:
SELECT
    a.region,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.is_ring_candidate = TRUE THEN a.account_id END) * 1.0 / COUNT(a.account_id) AS share_in_ring_candidate_communities
FROM `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.accounts a
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.community_memberships cm ON a.account_id = cm.account_id
JOIN `graph-enriched-finance-silver`.communities c ON cm.community_id = c.community_id
GROUP BY a.region
